name: Baked Chicken with Mushrooms and Artichokes
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Season chicken breast halves with salt and pepper.
3. Place skin side up in a 9" x 13" baking dish.
4. Drain artichokes, reserving marinade. Cut artichokes in half.
5. Top chicken breasts with artichokes, mushrooms, and green onions.
6. Pour reserved marinade and white wine over chicken.
7. Bake until chicken is cooked through, about 45 minutes.
